title: Stripe webhook retries spiking
description: Retries on webhook events (checkout.session.completed, payment_intent.succeeded) increased to ~14% over baseline in the last hour. Payments are still completing, but delays are causing retries from Stripe.
why_it_matters: Repeated retries can duplicate side effects if idempotency is not enforced and may mask downstream failures.
suggested_next_step: Verify idempotency keys on /api/stripe/webhook and check Shopify app timeout settings; consider increasing webhook timeout to 15s.

title: API error rate 5% in EU-West
description: Production API errors in eu-west-1 crossed 5% for 10 minutes; p95 latency doubled. Health checks flapped and auto-scaler rolled back a canary.
why_it_matters: Active users in the EU may see failures and degraded experience. Potential revenue impact if checkout endpoints fail.
suggested_next_step: Keep rollout paused, tail error logs for 500s on api-gateway and auth-service, and prepare an incident summary link.

title: GrowthWeekly newsletter mention
description: Our Summer Launch was featured in GrowthWeekly #214. Early referral traffic is up ~7% hour-over-hour.
why_it_matters: Good top-of-funnel awareness that could convert with timely follow-up.
suggested_next_step: Queue a social thank-you and add UTM-tagged link to the post; monitor sign-ups from newsletter referrers for 48h.
